text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time for training camp is here once again.
Unlike last year, Nice Nature seems enthusiastic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have the autumn Tenno Sho ahead of us, and
the Arima Kinen after that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her red-hot summer of self-development begins!
